settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account, preferences, and integrations

settings.minimizeToTrayDesc: Hide to system tray instead of closing completely

nav.agentManagementDesc: Create and manage your AI agents
nav.noAgentsDesc: Create your first agent to get started with OpenClaw
nav.deleteAgentConfirm: This action cannot be undone. All configuration will be permanently removed.
nav.addFirstChannel: Add your first messaging channel to get started

quickActions.title: Quick Actions
quickActions.subtitle: Launch features and navigate to key sections
quickActions.assistantOffline: AI assistant is offline. Launch it to start using Openclaw.
quickActions.configureAgentDesc: Create and manage your AI agents

channels.title: Add New Channel
channels.subtitle: Connect Openclaw to your messaging platforms
channels.discordDesc: Set up bot with developer portal
channels.feishuDesc: Connect via App ID & App Secret
channels.scanQR: Scan this QR code with your WhatsApp mobile app:
channels.qrTimeout: QR generation took too long. Please try again.
channels.alreadyConnectedDesc: Your WhatsApp is already linked to this device
channels.connectFailed: Failed to connect {{channel}}. Please check your credentials.
channels.enterSlackTokens: Enter your Slack app tokens (Socket Mode):
channels.enterLineCredentials: Enter your LINE Messaging API credentials:
channels.qrTakingLong: QR generation is taking longer than expected
channels.problemWithOpenClaw: This might indicate a problem with OpenClaw
channels.mayTake30Seconds: This may take up to 30 seconds
channels.viewMessages: View received and sent {{channel}} messages through OpenClaw
channels.messageMetadataNote: Currently showing message metadata. The actual message content is stored separately for privacy.
channels.messagesWillAppear: Messages will appear here when {{channel}} is connected and active

chat.title: AI Chat
chat.subtitle: Chat with your AI assistant powered by OpenClaw
chat.gatewayNeeded: The OpenClaw Gateway needs to be running to use the chat feature.
chat.goToSidebar: Go to the sidebar and click **Launch assistant**
chat.separateGateway: The desktop app connects to your OpenClaw gateway (default port 18789). It can manage an existing gateway or start one using your system OpenClaw installation.
chat.typeBelow: Type your message below to chat with the AI assistant
chat.sendShortcut: Press Cmd+Enter (Mac) or Ctrl+Enter (Windows) to send
chat.upgradeMessage: Upgrade your plan to get more tokens and continue chatting without interruption.
chat.requestTimeout: The request timed out after 150 seconds. The AI model may be rate-limited or overloaded. Please try again.
chat.tapMicOrSpeak: Tap the mic or start speaking...

doctor.title: OpenClaw Doctor
doctor.subtitle: Diagnose and fix OpenClaw configuration issues
doctor.clickToStart: Click "Run Diagnostics" to start OpenClaw Doctor

commands.title: Commands
commands.subtitle: Run OpenClaw operations without the terminal

cron.title: Cron Jobs
cron.subtitle: Schedule automated tasks that run on a timer, cron expression, or one-time date.
cron.noJobsDesc: Create a scheduled task to automate recurring messages or events.

sessions.title: Chat Sessions
sessions.subtitle: View and manage conversation sessions
sessions.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this session? This action cannot be undone.

workspace.title: Agent Workspace
workspace.subtitle: Edit the markdown files that define your AI agent's personality and behavior
workspace.noFiles: No workspace files found. Click + to create one.
workspace.selectFile: Select a file from the sidebar to edit
workspace.createDesc: Name will be uppercased with .md extension
workspace.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this file? This action cannot be undone.

memory.title: Memory Browser
memory.selectDate: Select a date to view memory logs

usage.title: Usage Dashboard
usage.subtitle: Token usage and estimated costs from your sessions

activity.title: Activity Log
activity.subtitle: Real-time OpenClaw gateway activity and WhatsApp messages
activity.noActivity: No activity yet. OpenClaw will show logs here when running.

aiProvider.localOpenClawDesc: Use your own API keys with local OpenClaw server
aiProvider.title: AI Provider
aiProvider.subtitle: Select your AI provider and configure models. Press Apply when ready.
aiProvider.installModelsHint: Install models in the Models section. Make sure Ollama is running.
aiProvider.whisperApiHint: Uses the Whisper API for speech-to-text transcription.
aiProvider.whisperNotInstalled: Local Whisper server is not installed.
aiProvider.installViaHint: Install via {{tool}} to enable local speech-to-text.
aiProvider.startingDownloading: Starting (downloading model may take a few minutes)...
aiProvider.googleSttHint: Uses Google Cloud Speech-to-Text v1 API.
aiProvider.changesAfterRestart: Changes take effect after the gateway restarts
aiProvider.reminderAgentConfig: Reminder: Don't forget to configure the corresponding model in Agent Management if needed.
aiProvider.enterApiKeyFor: Please enter an API key for {{provider}}.

agentRouting.title: Agent Routing Rules
agentRouting.subtitle: Configure which agents respond to messages from different channels
agentRouting.selectBoth: Please select both channel and agent
agentRouting.selectChannel: Please select a channel to test
agentRouting.noRulesConfigured: No routing rules configured. All messages will go to the default agent.

models.title: Models
models.subtitle: Manage your local AI models powered by Ollama

skills.title: OpenClaw Skills
skills.subtitle: Manage OpenClaw skills to extend functionality with integrations like 1Password, GitHub, Apple Notes, and more.
skills.searchPlaceholder: Search skills by name or description...
skills.browseSkills: Browse community skills from ClawHub registry
skills.installedViaClawHub: Installed via ClawHub. Not currently loaded by the gateway.
skills.gatewayOffNotice: Start the gateway to see full skill status. Showing locally installed skills.
skills.browseDiscoverTab: Browse the Discover tab to find and install skills from ClawHub.
skills.disabledClickEnable: Disabled — click the power button to re-enable
skills.blockedByAllowlist: Blocked by allowlist — add "{{name}}" to skills.allowBundled in config to unblock
skills.installedRestartNeeded: Skill installed — restart the assistant to activate it

tools.full: Unrestricted – Run any command without asking
tools.gateway: Your Mac – Runs directly on your system (you'll be asked each time)
tools.node: Remote node – Delegates to a connected device
tools.allowlist: Safe list only – Run pre-approved commands without asking
tools.title: Tools & Permissions
tools.subtitle: Configure AI agent tool access and permissions
tools.applyToAllAgentsDesc: When enabled, changes will apply to both global settings and all individual agent configurations
tools.profilePresetsDesc: Choose a preset that matches how you want the AI to behave. You can fine-tune individual tools below.
tools.safeModeDesc: Read-only. AI can answer questions but cannot run commands, browse the web, or access files.
tools.assistantDesc: Recommended. AI can read files, search the web, and run pre-approved safe commands.
tools.chatbotDesc: Optimised for WhatsApp/Telegram bots. AI can manage conversations and search the web.
tools.powerUserDesc: All tools enabled. AI can run commands, write files, and use the web freely.
tools.runCommandsDesc: Control whether the AI can run terminal commands on your computer, and how safely it does so.
tools.sandboxHint: Isolated from your system — safest option, no approval prompts
tools.gatewayHint: Commands run on your Mac directly — you will be prompted to approve each one
tools.nodeHint: Commands are sent to a paired remote device or server
tools.denyHint: No commands will run — AI operates in read-only mode
tools.allowlistHint: Only common safe commands (git, npm, ls, etc.) run automatically
tools.fullHint: All commands run immediately — use only if you trust the AI fully
tools.noSafeCommands: No commands on the safe list yet
tools.internetAccessDesc: Let the AI look things up online to give you more accurate, up-to-date answers.
tools.searchTheWebDesc: AI can run Google-style searches to find current information
tools.readWebPagesDesc: AI can open a URL and read its content (e.g. docs, articles, product pages)
tools.seeAndHearDesc: Allow the AI to understand photos, audio, and video that users send in chat.
tools.photosImagesDesc: AI can describe, read text from, and answer questions about images
tools.voiceMessagesAudioDesc: AI can transcribe voice messages and summarise audio content
tools.videosDesc: AI can watch and describe video content, extract key moments and text
tools.understandLinksDesc: AI automatically detects URLs in conversations and can summarise or explain what they point to
tools.allowSensitiveOpsDesc: Lets the AI perform higher-risk actions like modifying system settings or accessing protected data. Only enable if you need it.
tools.macPermissionsDesc: System permissions required by OpenClaw. Denied permissions will silently disable related features.
tools.screenRecordingDesc: Screen capture for visual AI context
tools.microphoneDesc: Voice input and audio processing for AI
tools.cameraDesc: Visual context and image capture for AI

hooks.title: OpenClaw Hooks
hooks.subtitle: Event-driven automation that runs when agent events fire — like /new, /reset, or gateway startup. Enable the hooks you want active.
hooks.searchPlaceholder: Search hooks by name, description, or event...
hooks.gatewayOffBanner: Start the gateway to manage hooks. You can install hook packs from the "Install" tab while offline.
hooks.noHooksAvailableDesc: Install hook packs from the "Install" tab, or make sure OpenClaw is running and try refreshing.
hooks.disabledClickEnable: Disabled — click the power button to enable
hooks.installHookPackDesc: Enter an npm package name or local path to a hook pack
hooks.hookPackInfo: Hook packs are npm packages that bundle one or more hooks. Each hook is a directory with a HOOK.md metadata file and a handler.ts implementation.
hooks.hookPackInstallPath: Hooks are installed to ~/.openclaw/hooks/ and discovered automatically on gateway restart.

plugins.title: OpenClaw Plugins
plugins.subtitle: Extend OpenClaw with plugins — add voice calling, custom integrations, and more.
plugins.gatewayOffBanner: Start the gateway to manage plugins. Install new plugins from the "Install New" tab while offline.
plugins.noPluginsInstalledDesc: Extend OpenClaw with plugins. Switch to the "Install New" tab to get started.
plugins.requiresConfig: Requires configuration before enabling — see plugin docs
plugins.disabledClickEnable: Disabled — click the power button to enable
plugins.installFromSpecDesc: Enter a plugin ID or npm package name
plugins.doctorComplete: Doctor check complete — no issues found.

welcome.heroText: Your personal AI assistant that works across all your messaging platforms. Get started in just a few minutes and transform how you communicate.
welcome.startAssistantDesc: Click the Home button and start your AI assistant to begin
welcome.connectChannelsDesc: Set up WhatsApp, Telegram, or Discord to chat from anywhere
welcome.configureModelsDesc: Choose between local models or cloud providers
welcome.startChattingDesc: Open the AI assistant and start your conversation
welcome.multiChannelDesc: Connect WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, and more
welcome.localModelsDesc: Run AI models locally with Ollama for privacy
welcome.realTimeActivityDesc: Monitor all conversations and system activity

general.readyToHelp: Your AI assistant is ready to help!
general.startToBegin: Start your AI assistant to begin

controlDashboard.title: Control Center
controlDashboard.subtitle: Manage your Openclaw AI assistant and monitor system performance
controlDashboard.onlineReady: AI assistant is online and ready to respond
controlDashboard.offlineClick: AI assistant is offline - click Start to begin

windowsPermissions.title: Windows Permissions
windowsPermissions.subtitle: System permissions required by OpenClaw. Open Windows Settings to grant access if needed.
windowsPermissions.microphoneDesc: Voice input and audio processing for AI
windowsPermissions.cameraDesc: Visual context and image capture for AI
windowsPermissions.screenCaptureDesc: No system permission required on Windows
windowsPermissions.accessibilityDesc: No system permission required on Windows

ollama.requiredDesc: To install {{modelName}}, Ollama is required but not currently installed on your system.
ollama.aboutOllama: Ollama is a free, open-source tool that enables running AI models locally on your computer. We'll download and install the official Ollama app for you.
ollama.installingDesc: Please wait while we download and install the official Ollama app. This may take a few minutes.
ollama.doNotClose: Do not close this window during installation
ollama.installedDesc: You can now install AI models. This popup will close automatically.

toast.restartAssistant: Restart the assistant to apply channel changes.

agentForm.agentNameCannotChange: Agent name cannot be changed after creation
agentForm.toDownloadOllama: to download an Ollama model first.
agentForm.byokApiKeyHint: Configure API key in <1>AI Configuration</1> → Bring Your Own Key.
agentForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what this agent is for...
agentForm.failoverProtectionDesc: Configure backup models that OpenClaw will use if the primary model fails due to rate limits, auth issues, or downtime.
agentForm.agentCreatedLocal:
Agent created successfully!

Agent "{{name}}" is now using local model "{{model}}" and is ready for offline usage.
agentForm.agentUpdatedLocal:
Agent updated successfully!

Agent "{{name}}" is now using local model "{{model}}" and is ready for offline usage.

onboarding.title: OpenClaw Onboarding
onboarding.subtitle: Configure your AI automation system step-by-step
onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Your personal AI assistant on WhatsApp, Telegram & more
onboarding.setupIn5Minutes: Let's set up your AI assistant in just 5 minutes.
onboarding.wizardGuide: This wizard will guide you through:
onboarding.selectPlanFits: Select the plan that best fits your needs
onboarding.aiIncluded: AI is included - no API key needed!
onboarding.noChargeTrial: You won't be charged during the 7-day trial
onboarding.cancelBeforeTrial: Cancel anytime before the trial ends to avoid charges.
onboarding.connectOrSkip: Connect your AI provider, or skip to configure later in Dashboard settings
onboarding.upgradeToProIncluded: Or upgrade to Pro for AI included!
onboarding.invalidApiKey: Invalid API key. Please check and try again.
onboarding.failedValidateKey: Failed to validate API key. Please try again.
onboarding.selectChannelsForAI: Select the channels you want to use with your AI assistant
onboarding.channelNote: You can add or remove channels anytime from the dashboard. We recommend starting with WhatsApp or Telegram for the best experience.
onboarding.assistantReady: Your AI assistant is ready to use
onboarding.openMessagingApp: Open your messaging app (WhatsApp, Telegram, etc.)
onboarding.sendMessage: Send a message to your AI assistant
onboarding.startChattingAI: Start chatting with your personal AI!
